requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — NSI Conformity and Namibia Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——NSI合格评定及纳米比亚项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——NSI合格評定及納米比亞項目驗收

summary.en: For solar PV inverters supplied to Namibia, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the central international safety references for power converters used in photovoltaic power systems. Namibia project acceptance should confirm whether NSI-adopted Namibian standards, the ECB regulatory route, NamPower or RED connection conditions, EPC specifications, or lender requirements call for IEC 62109 certificates or test reports. IEC 62109-2 covers inverter-specific safety requirements and is assessed together with IEC 62109-1 general requirements.
summary.zh: 供应纳米比亚的太阳能光伏逆变器，应以IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2作为光伏电力系统用功率变换器的核心国际安全依据。纳米比亚项目验收应确认NSI采纳的纳米比亚标准、ECB监管路径、NamPower或RED接入条件、EPC规格或贷款方要求是否要求IEC 62109证书或测试报告。IEC 62109-2覆盖逆变器特殊安全要求，并与IEC 62109-1通用要求一并评估。
summary.zht: 供應納米比亞的太陽能光伏逆變器，應以IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2作為光伏電力系統用功率轉換器的核心國際安全依據。納米比亞項目驗收應確認NSI採納的納米比亞標準、ECB監管路徑、NamPower或RED接入條件、EPC規格或貸款方要求是否要求IEC 62109證書或測試報告。IEC 62109-2覆蓋逆變器特殊安全要求，並與IEC 62109-1通用要求一併評估。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
NSI conformity expectations where Namibian standards adopt or reference IEC standards
ECB, NamPower, RED, EPC, and lender project documentation requirements

summary.en: Chinese safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, voluntary CQC or CGC certification, and factory test documentation. These can show China-side product testing but do not automatically satisfy IEC 62109-1/-2 or Namibia project acceptance. A Namibia project may require third-party IEC reports from an accredited laboratory covering the exact inverter model or model family.
summary.zh: 中国安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、自愿性CQC或CGC认证及工厂测试文件。这些文件可显示中国侧产品测试，但不会自动满足IEC 62109-1/-2或纳米比亚项目验收。纳米比亚项目可能要求由认可实验室出具、覆盖具体逆变器型号或型号系列的第三方IEC报告。
summary.zht: 中國安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、自願性CQC或CGC認證及工廠測試文件。這些文件可顯示中國側產品測試，但不會自動滿足IEC 62109-1/-2或納米比亞項目驗收。納米比亞項目可能要求由認可實驗室出具、覆蓋具體逆變器型號或型號系列的第三方IEC報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China-side GB/T safety files are not a direct substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates or type-test reports for the inverter model, confirm model-family coverage, verify that DC input voltage, AC output rating, enclosure/IP rating, firmware, and intended installation environment are covered, and align the evidence with the NSI, ECB, NamPower/RED, EPC, and lender review path.
gap.zh: 差距：中国侧GB/T安全文件不能直接替代IEC 62109-1/-2证据。出口商应取得逆变器型号的IEC 62109-1/-2证书或型式试验报告，确认型号系列覆盖范围，核验直流输入电压、交流输出额定值、外壳/IP等级、固件及预期安装环境是否被覆盖，并使证据与NSI、ECB、NamPower/RED、EPC和贷款方审查路径一致。
gap.zht: 差距：中國側GB/T安全文件不能直接替代IEC 62109-1/-2證據。出口商應取得逆變器型號的IEC 62109-1/-2證書或型式試驗報告，確認型號系列覆蓋範圍，核驗直流輸入電壓、交流輸出額定值、外殼/IP等級、韌體及預期安裝環境是否被覆蓋，並使證據與NSI、ECB、NamPower/RED、EPC和貸款方審查路徑一致。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice for inverter acceptance where NSI-adopted IEC standards, utility connection conditions, EPC specifications, or lender requirements reference IEC 62109
mandatory_status.cn: China-side GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC evidence supports domestic acceptance but does not by itself create Namibia safety acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A PV inverter with only China-side GB/T or NB/T safety evidence should not be treated as accepted for Namibia. Build the safety file around IEC 62109-1/-2, confirm NSI conformity expectations, and align the model coverage with the ECB, NamPower/RED, EPC, lender, and project-owner review route before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅具备中国侧GB/T或NB/T安全证据的光伏逆变器不应被视为已获纳米比亚接受。应围绕IEC 62109-1/-2构建安全文件，确认NSI合格评定预期，并在出货前使型号覆盖范围与ECB、NamPower/RED、EPC、贷款方及项目业主审查路径一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅具備中國側GB/T或NB/T安全證據的光伏逆變器不應被視為已獲納米比亞接受。應圍繞IEC 62109-1/-2構建安全文件，確認NSI合格評定預期，並在出貨前使型號覆蓋範圍與ECB、NamPower/RED、EPC、貸款方及項目業主審查路徑一致。
